description: Create a flowchart in Wondershare EdrawMax depicting the Git pull request workflow. The diagram must include the following shapes connected by directional arrows: an oval labeled 'Start', a rectangle labeled 'Create Feature Branch', a rectangle labeled 'Write Code & Commit', a rectangle labeled 'Push Branch to Remote', a rectangle labeled 'Open Pull Request', a diamond labeled 'Tests Pass?', a rectangle labeled 'Fix Failures' (on No branch, looping back to Write Code), a rectangle labeled 'Code Review' (on Yes branch), a diamond labeled 'Approved?', a rectangle labeled 'Request Changes' (on No branch, looping back to Write Code), a rectangle labeled 'Merge to Main' (on Yes branch), and an oval labeled 'End'. Save the completed diagram to /home/ga/git_pr_
